overview: Lenoue Integrative Medicine provides musculoskeletal care including sports medicine, osteopathic manipulative treatment, chiropractic adjustments, and massage therapy.
highlights: Board-certified doctors in sports medicine with musculoskeletal ultrasound certification
Osteopathic manipulative treatment with multiple techniques including cranial and visceral work
Multiple massage therapy specializations including sports massage and trigger point therapy
targetAudience: Athletes and active individuals seeking treatment and prevention of exercise-related injuries.
